description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a steep gable roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominating the front facade. The exterior is primarily dark gray, with contrasting light gray panels beneath the windows and on the side walls. The roof is covered with rectangular shingles, adding subtle texture to the structure. The front of the house includes a recessed entryway with a small set of steps leading up to it, and a covered porch area beneath the upper story overhang. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with expansive glass panels providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a steep gable roof, large front-facing windows, and a dark gray exterior accented by light gray panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a covered porch area beneath the upper story.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shingled roof and a solid wall with a single large window panel.
description_view_2: Alternate front angle emphasizing the asymmetrical window arrangement and the angular roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the roof shingles and a solid wall with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, covered porch, and minimalistic modern styling
